summary: Tested Mira Session Persistence, Multi-Pet Support, and Past Chats functionality. Backend APIs verified (16/17 passed, 1 skipped). Frontend features verified: History button opens Past Chats sidebar, Start New Chat clears conversation, session recovery on page refresh works, conversation context (pet allergies/preferences) preserved.

minor.issue: Route conflict: mira_routes.py line 6880 intercepts requests before mira_session_persistence.py. The route in mira_routes.py queries mira_tickets collection instead of mira_sessions. Frontend uses /messages endpoint which works correctly.

backend.session_create: PASS - POST /api/mira/session/create works with full pet/member context
backend.switch_pet: PASS - POST /api/mira/session/switch-pet creates/loads sessions per pet

frontend.history_button: PASS - History button in dock opens Past Chats sidebar
frontend.past_chats_sidebar: PASS - Shows sessions with pet name, date, preview
frontend.start_new_chat: PASS - Clears conversation and creates new session
frontend.session_recovery: PASS - Conversation restored after page refresh
frontend.conversation_context: PASS - Mira remembers pet allergies (chicken), preferences (peanut butter)
frontend.pet_selector: PASS - Shows Buddy/Golden Retriever, dropdown only appears with multiple pets

verified_features.session_persistence: Conversations saved to MongoDB, recovered on page refresh
verified_features.multi_session_management: Past Chats sidebar shows previous sessions
verified_features.multi_pet_support: switch-pet API creates/loads sessions per pet
verified_features.conversation_context: Mira remembers pet details across turns

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix route conflict - rename /session/{session_id} in mira_routes.py or mira_session_persistence.py to avoid collision
critical_code_review_comments: Route conflict between mira_routes.py:6880 and mira_session_persistence.py:324 - both define GET /api/mira/session/{session_id} but query different collections (mira_tickets vs mira_sessions). Low priority since frontend uses /messages endpoint.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_mira_session_persistence.py - New test file for session persistence APIs
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created with TEST_ prefix in mira_sessions collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session persistence APIs all working. Route conflict exists at GET /api/mira/session/{id} but doesn't affect frontend since it uses /messages endpoint. Past Chats sidebar, Start New Chat, and session recovery all verified working. Multi-pet switching works - creates new sessions per pet or loads existing.
screenshots_taken: mira_demo_initial.png - Initial page load showing History button and pet selector
mira_past_chats_sidebar.png - Past Chats sidebar with Luna session visible
mira_conversation.png - Birthday planning conversation with amber question strip
mira_session_recovery.png - Session recovery showing Mira remembering chicken allergy
